## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Sync-core logic change (paths, encoding, conflict/sync decisions)

## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `./gradlew ktlintCheck` and it is clean.
- [ ] I ran `./gradlew detekt` and it is clean.
- [ ] I ran `./gradlew test` and all unit tests pass.
- [ ] I added/updated unit tests for my change (sync core stays device-independent).
- [ ] The PAT is never logged, persisted in plaintext, or sent to any host other than GitHub.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under **Unreleased** (if user-facing).
